title: compat: conditionally compile integration tests requiring analysis feature 🧷
summary: Added `#![cfg(feature = "analysis")]` to 52 integration tests that were failing when `tokmd` was tested with `--no-default-features`.
proof_summary: Running `cargo test --no-default-features -p tokmd --tests` before showed 52 failing test suites because the CLI commands they test (analyze, badge, baseline, run, gate) require the `analysis` feature. After adding the `#![cfg(feature = "analysis")]` attribute, the command succeeds.
rollback: Remove the `#![cfg(feature = "analysis")]` attribute from the modified test files.
